calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Emily D. Pierce In Support Thereof (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Vacate Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff admits that the judgment was the product of identity theft and should not have been entered. The case is dismissed pursuant to plaintiff's request.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Motion To Vacate Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Emily D. Pierce In Support Thereof (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Off Calendar
